login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your account credentials
login.heroSub: Sign in to book rooms, track reservations and manage your account.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Create an account to get started
register.name: Full Name
register.passwordHint: Include uppercase, lowercase, number and special character (@$!%*?&)
register.success: Registration successful! Redirecting to email verification...
register.heroSub: Create an account to book rooms, receive offers and manage your stay.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPassword: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, number and special character

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your details to continue
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive OTP
forgotPassword.notFound: No account found with this email.
forgotPassword.heroSub: Enter your registered email to receive a verification code.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your details to complete
resetPassword.passwordHint2: Include uppercase, lowercase, number and special character (@$!%*?&)
resetPassword.generalError: An error occurred, please try again.
resetPassword.heroSub: Enter the OTP from your email and set a new password for your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter the verification code sent to your email
verifyEmail.success: Email verified successfully! Redirecting to login...
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Verification code resent to your email!
verifyEmail.generalError: An error occurred, please try again.
verifyEmail.heroSub: Enter the verification code sent to your email to complete registration.

apiErrors.emailAlreadyExists: This email is already registered, please use a different one.
apiErrors.emailNotFound: No account found with this email address.
apiErrors.notVerified: Please verify your email before signing in.
apiErrors.alreadyVerified: This email has already been verified.
apiErrors.invalidVerificationCode: Invalid verification code or email mismatch.
apiErrors.invalidOtp: Invalid OTP code or email mismatch.
apiErrors.disposableEmail: Please use a real email address, not a temporary one.
